description: The classic tale of Sinbad the Sailor, adapted for Popeye and Olive. Featuring memorable appearances by Wimpy, Olive, and the singing two-headed monster. You can find more information regarding this film on its IMDb page . More information is available from the Wikipedia article here .
subject: Classic cartoon
Popeye
1930s
title: Popeye the Sailor meets Sinbad the Sailor
